sections.title: Part 1
sections.instructions: The examiner asks you general questions about yourself and familiar topics.

topics.title: Holidays
questions: Do you prefer spending holidays with friends or with family? [Why?]
What kind of holiday accommodation do you like to stay in? [Why?]
What plans do you have for your next holiday?
Is your city or region a good place for other people to visit on holiday? [Why/Why not?]

sections.title: Part 2
sections.instructions: You will have 1 minute to prepare and should speak for 1–2 minutes.

cueCard.title: Describe a car journey you made that took longer than expected.
cueCard.task: Describe a car journey you made that took longer than expected.
points: How you felt during the journey
And explain why this car journey took longer than expected.
cueCard.endingQuestion: And explain why this car journey took longer than expected.

sections.title: Part 3
sections.instructions: The examiner and the candidate discuss issues related to the Part 2 topic.
questions: How interested are young people in your country in learning to drive?
What are the differences between driving in the countryside and driving in the city?
Do you consider most drivers where you live to be good drivers?
How popular are electric cars in your country?
In what ways could more people be persuaded to buy electric cars?
Do you think all cars will be electric one day?
